contract.goal: Ship the plugins/ev-linear/ skeleton + ev-linear:ev-run router skill (parallel to ev:ev-run per DESIGN § 17). Plugin becomes loadable; griot integration excised entirely per § 18; substrate references swapped from bin/loom to bin/linear-loom; concepts without Linear-native analogs (sessions, pr-events append, events.jsonl emissions) are dropped per the operator's grill-me posture this session.
acceptance_criteria: plugins/ev-linear/.claude-plugin/plugin.json (new) with name + description matching ev's manifest shape.
.claude-plugin/marketplace.json (modified): add ev-linear entry between ev and agent-loop-full with dependencies: [commons, linear-loom, guild] (no loom, no griot per § 17 + § 18).

plugins/ev-linear/skills/ev-run/SKILL.md (new — derived from ev's): name `ev-linear:ev-run`; all bin/loom → bin/linear-loom; preflight checks linear-loom + guild (drops loom + griot); § 1.5 'Load learnings' REMOVED; § 1 'Orient' simplified (no session-list step, no PR-event reads); § 2 'save session' row removed, 'archive' → /linear-loom-archive; § 4 dispatch targets /ev-linear:ev-loop-*; § 5 'Loaded N learnings' line dropped; auto-mode event emissions removed, panel-based resolution logic kept; every griot-write side block removed.
plugins/ev-linear/docs/SUBSTRATE-COMPOSITIONS.md (new — placeholder + cross-references to linear-loom DESIGN.md; recipes land in U2/U3 alongside their consuming loop skills).
plugins/commons/cli/marketplace-manifest.test.ts (modified): EXPECTED_PLUGIN_NAMES adds 'ev-linear'; test name accuracy fix ('six' → 'eight' since the array now has 8 entries).
npm test → 911 passing across 65 files. Baseline 900 after Phase 6 close. Net +11 from existing marketplace tests auto-counting the new ev-linear entry.
rules_applied: DESIGN.md § 17 (ev-linear is a parallel plugin to ev — derivatives of ev's skill bodies with substrate references swapped; no dual-backend abstraction).
DESIGN.md § 18 (ev-linear excises griot integration entirely — no rollup load, no capture writes anywhere).
DESIGN.md § 8 (linear-loom drops events.jsonl as a substrate concept; event-emission sites in the ev port have nowhere to write and are dropped).

Operator's grill-me posture this session: care about parity ONLY where the concept makes sense in Linear. Sessions, pr-events, and auto-mode event emissions don't have Linear-native homes → dropped from ev-linear v1.
disqualifiers: Porting docs/LOOM-CONVENTIONS.md — linear-loom has its own conventions in DESIGN.md; ev-linear skills cite the linear-loom DESIGN directly.
Porting docs/AGENT-CONVENTIONS.md and docs/PANEL-COMPOSITION.md — ev-linear cross-references the ev plugin's copies via path. Future cleanup is its own follow-on.
Building a linear-loom session namespace — operator dropped that surface for ev-linear; the verb stays a Phase 6 placeholder.
Adding a linear-loom events append verb — DESIGN § 8 explicitly rejects this; the event-emission gaps in the ported skill are dropped, not stubbed.
Restoring any griot reference — § 18 is firm.
inputs: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json (registry entry template — ev's entry is the closest analog)
plugins/linear-loom/cli/linear-loom.ts (verb namespaces shipped through Phase 6 — defines what ev-run can cite without hitting a placeholder)
plugins/ev/docs/SUBSTRATE-COMPOSITIONS.md (recipe source for any future U2/U3 ports)

actions: Added ev-linear entry to .claude-plugin/marketplace.json between ev and agent-loop-full, with dependencies: [commons, linear-loom, guild] (no loom, no griot per § 17 + § 18).
Wrote plugins/ev-linear/.claude-plugin/plugin.json: name 'ev-linear' + description naming the three skills + the substrate target (linear-loom) + griot-excision callout.

Wrote plugins/ev-linear/skills/ev-run/SKILL.md (~240 lines, simplified port of ev's 304-line ev-run). Every bin/loom → bin/linear-loom. Preflight drops loom + griot. § 1.5 'Load learnings' deleted entirely. § 1 'Orient' simplified to two CLI calls (project read + events read; no session-list because linear-loom has no session-write surface). § 2 redirect table drops 'save session' / 'wrap up' with a one-line note explaining the absence. § 4 dispatch targets /ev-linear:ev-loop-* (warned about NOT bare /ev-loop-* to prevent cross-plugin routing). § 5 drops the 'Loaded N learnings' sentence. Auto-mode event emissions (auto-mode-entered / -converged / -budget-exhausted) deleted; the panel-based resolution logic itself preserved. Every griot-write side block ('alongside the event emission, write a session-note via § Capture finding') removed. Added forward-reference note about U2/U3 shipping the loop skills.

Wrote plugins/ev-linear/docs/SUBSTRATE-COMPOSITIONS.md as a minimal placeholder. ev-run cites no § Recipe blocks directly (all the recipes it would have cited — § Capture finding, § Save session — are either dropped or owned by loop skills). The docs file notes the recipe-set-grows-with-U2/U3 pattern + cross-references linear-loom's DESIGN.md for substrate surface.

Updated plugins/commons/cli/marketplace-manifest.test.ts: EXPECTED_PLUGIN_NAMES gained 'ev-linear'; the existing test name 'declares exactly the six expected plugins' updated to 'eight' (the list had 7 entries pre-change so 'six' was already stale; now 8 with ev-linear).

Verified: npm test → 911 passing across 65 files (was 900 after Phase 6 close; +11 from marketplace tests auto-detecting the new ev-linear entry — each plugin entry adds ~1 existence + a few schema-shape tests in commons/cli/marketplace-manifest.test.ts). Panel (contract-fit only — markdown/JSON-only surface, no TS/test code): approved on first run; zero findings.

changes_since_previous: First unit of Phase 7 (ev-linear plugin). Phase 7 sliced 3 PRs at operator request: U1 scaffold + ev-run; U2 /linear-loom-revise-plan + ev-loop-interactive; U3 ev-loop-confidence. With this PR merged, the ev-linear plugin loads via the marketplace and the router skill is invocable. The two loop skills remain forward-references — invoking ev-linear:ev-run before U2/U3 land surfaces a skill-not-found error at dispatch time.
notes_for_pr: Operator's grill-me posture shaped two big calls in this unit: (1) griot is excised entirely per § 18 — no rollup load, no capture writes, simpler body by a measurable margin; (2) where Linear has no native analog for a loom-substrate concept (sessions, pr-events, events.jsonl emissions), the corresponding skill-body sections are dropped rather than stubbed. The body documents each drop at the precise site where the ev plugin would have done the work.

ev-linear:ev-run dispatches ONLY to /ev-linear:ev-loop-* — explicitly NOT the bare /ev-loop-* names. Cross-plugin loop dispatch would route to the wrong substrate (loom vs linear-loom). The body calls this out as a rule (§ Rules: 'No cross-plugin loop dispatch').

AGENT-CONVENTIONS.md and PANEL-COMPOSITION.md are NOT duplicated under plugins/ev-linear/docs/. They're substrate-shared docs; ev-linear cites them cross-plugin via path. Future cleanup: extract to commons/docs/ once the marketplace structure supports the shape.

SUBSTRATE-COMPOSITIONS.md ships as a placeholder. ev-run itself cites no § Recipe blocks directly (every recipe it would have cited is either dropped or owned by loop skills). The recipe set grows in U2/U3 as the loop skills consume them.
scope-shift signals: zero. Clean start of Phase 7. The operator's grill-me posture on what to drop vs port is a contract-level decision, not a PLAN.md-rewrite signal.

Lagged event note: this commit will likely carry a pr-opened event for THIS unit (#TBD) since loom emits the event after `loom pr open` runs in the next step; the lag pattern (substrate-known gap from feedback_loom_pr_opened_orphan_and_guild_spec_path) carries the event into U2.

Substrate follow-up still standing: bin/guild derive-panel returns 'panel-spec-unreadable (using fallback)' under the marketplace-installed CLI. Used node plugins/guild/cli/guild.ts locally throughout Phase 7 U1.
